title: Amy Kligman: The Salon for Possible Futures
description: Amy Kligman: The Salon for Possible Futures is a built environment installation that takes on the familiar shape of a living room. It acts at once as a library, a gallery, a cabinet of curiosity, a third space, a common room, and a think tank. After an engaging year of thoughtful and interactive co…

title: Julie Buffalohead: Stories of Becoming
description: The stories adapted from European folktales often feature a desire for riches, status, and romance. In comparison, Indigenous stories highlight relations to other beings. In accordance with the Indigenous imperative to see the land, animals, and other living beings represented, Julie Buffalohead’s…

title: Everyday Democracy: Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness in Johnson County
description: Just in time for America’s 250th anniversary, the Johnson County Museum is opening a new temporary exhibit which explores this national moment and the meaning of democracy through the lens of life in Johnson County.“Everyday Democracy: Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness in Johnson County”…

title: Poetry in Bloom: An Emily Dickinson Garden Walk
description: Step into a world where verse and nature intertwine. title: Raku Day at House of Clay
